mapper.sql: lr.id, lr.employee_id, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, lr.leave_type, lr.start_date, lr.end_date, lr.total_days, lr.reason, lr.status, lr.approver_id, apu.full_name AS approver_name, lr.approved_at, lr.reject_reason, lr.linked_item_id, lr.created_by, lr.created_at, lr.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM erp_leave_requests lr LEFT JOIN erp_employees e ON lr.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN erp_employees ap ON lr.approver_id = ap.id LEFT JOIN users apu ON ap.user_id = apu.id WHERE lr.id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_leave_requests (id, employee_id, leave_type, start_date, end_date, total_days, reason, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{employeeId}::uuid, #{leaveType}, #{startDate}::date, #{endDate}::date, #{totalDays}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{createdBy}::uuid, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE erp_leave_requests SET leave_type = #{leaveType}, start_date = #{startDate}::date, end_date = #{endDate}::date, total_days = #{totalDays}, reason = #{reason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid

UPDATE erp_leave_requests SET status = #{status}, approver_id = #{approverId}::uuid, approved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} IN ('approved','rejected') THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid
mapper.select: SELECT lb.id, lb.employee_id, u.full_name AS employee_name, e.employee_no, lb.year, lb.total_days, lb.used_days, lb.remaining_days FROM erp_leave_balances lb LEFT JOIN erp_employees e ON lb.employee_id = e.id LEFT JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE lb.employee_id = #{employeeId}::uuid AND lb.year = #{year} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO erp_leave_balances (id, employee_id, year, total_days, used_days, remaining_days, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id}::uuid, #{employeeId}::uuid, #{year}, #{totalDays}, #{usedDays}, #{remainingDays}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (employee_id, year) DO UPDATE SET used_days = #{usedDays}, remaining_days = #{remainingDays}, updated_at = NOW()
